dailyNews.title: Cannabis may backfire for mental health disorders, major study finds

dailyNews.title: Out-of-control teen mob in DC reveals failure of blue city soft-on-crime policies
dailyNews.description: Washington, D.C.,'s juvenile curfew authority is set to expire, and Mayor Muriel Bowser and mayoral candidates face pressure to address teen takeovers.

dailyNews.title: One American's detention in Lebanon exposed a truth that is now devastating an entire country
dailyNews.description: Hezbollah's unchecked power, backed by Iran, enabled Amer Fakhoury's detention and now fuels a devastating war in Lebanon its people never chose.

dailyNews.title: Maryland Dems mocked for prioritizing tampons in men’s bathrooms amid state deficit: 'Nonsense'
dailyNews.description: Maryland Democrats put on notice by GOP colleague who slammed them for focusing on putting tampons in men's bathrooms over real problems in Annapolis, like the state's growing deficit.

dailyNews.title: Cowboys star Dak Prescott's ex posts about 'growth' days after couple split before wedding
dailyNews.description: Dallas Cowboys star Dak Prescott's former fiancée, Sarah Jane Ramos, posted about "growth" days after the couple's relationship ended with the wedding around the corner.

dailyNews.title: Fox Nation, Tunnels to Towers explores how America’s pastime helped a grieving New York heal after 9/11
dailyNews.description: The New York Mets and Yankees reflect on baseball's role in healing America after 9/11 in a new Tunnels to Towers documentary on Fox Nation.

dailyNews.title: Tuberville suggests billionaires buying college programs would be worse than an NFL-style TV deal
dailyNews.description: Sen. Tommy Tuberville suggests that he'd rather see the NFL's unified media rights model in college football than billionaires buying and running programs.

dailyNews.title: UNC fires Hubert Davis after historic NCAA Tournament first-round collapse against VCU
dailyNews.description: UNC fired head coach Hubert Davis after the Tar Heels blew a 19-point second-half lead and lost to VCU in overtime, 82-78, in the NCAA Tournament.

dailyNews.title: Yankees legend gives thoughts on team running back last season's squad, Aaron Judge's clutch factor
dailyNews.description: CC Sabathia said the New York Yankees can contend by staying healthy and relying on pitching, while noting Aaron Judge must have a strong postseason to silence critics.

dailyNews.title: Victor Wembanyama builds MVP case as Spurs clinch division, end playoff drought
dailyNews.description: San Antonio Spurs star Victor Wembanyama made a three-part case for why he should lead the NBA MVP race, adding he plans to eliminate any debate by season’s end.

dailyNews.title: Trump urges RNC chair's wife to run for Congress, pledges endorsement: 'RUN, SYDNEY, RUN!'
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump encouraged Sydney Gruters, wife of Republican National Committee Chair Joe Gruters, to run in Florida's 16th Congressional District, pledging to back her if she runs.

dailyNews.title: Retiring Border Patrol Chief Bovino says he wishes he ‘caught even more’ illegals
dailyNews.description: Retiring Border Patrol Chief Greg Bovino revealed that one of his few regrets is that he did not arrest more illegal aliens, according to an interview with The New York Times.

topStories.title: We asked every lawmaker in Congress what they're doing to end the DHS shutdown

dailyNews.description: Democrats have vowed to keep forcing votes on the issue as they seek public testimony from administration officials.

dailyNews.title: Oil trades surged before Trump's Iran post. Some experts are suspicious.
dailyNews.description: Trading in crude oil futures spiked only minutes before President Trump postponed an ultimatum on Iran, causing oil prices to drop and stocks to surge.

dailyNews.title: Democrat Emily Gregory Wins Florida Special Election in Mar-a-Lago’s District
dailyNews.description: Emily Gregory’s victory in Palm Beach brought the Democratic surge to President Trump’s backyard, while a union leader leads in a race for a state senate seat vacated by Florida’s lieutenant governor.

dailyNews.title: Inside Trump’s Secret Deal to Deport Migrants to Cameroon
dailyNews.description: In Cameroon, the Trump administration found a partner it could pressure into accepting covertly deported migrants.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices fall as Iran signals safe passage for ‘non-hostile’ ships through Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Oil prices fell after Donald Trump that Washington and Tehran are "in negotiations right now" and indicated Iran is keen to reach a peace agreement.

dailyNews.title: Iran has received Trump's 15-point plan to end war, report says; President says 'in negotiations right now'
dailyNews.description: It comes amid a messaging clash between the U.S. and Iran on peace negotiations.

dailyNews.title: Sen. Warren: DOD answers show no anti-corruption protocols for Trump children
dailyNews.description: Democrats have been hotly critical of the Trump family's business dealings while President Donald Trump serves in the White House.

dailyNews.title: Emily Gregory projected to win Florida special election to represent Trump, Mar-a-Lago
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump had endorsed fellow Republican Jon Maples in the special election against Emily Gregory, the Democratic nominee.

dailyNews.title: Denmark’s PM Frederiksen suffers election setback after standing up to Trump over Greenland
dailyNews.description: Frederiksen had sought to capitalize on popular support after standing up to Trump's push to annex Greenland, a self-governing Danish territory.

dailyNews.title: Inside Trump's daily video montage briefing about the Iran war
dailyNews.description: WASHINGTON — Each day since the start of the war in Iran, U.S. military officials compile a video update for President Donald Trump that shows video of the biggest, most successful strikes on Iranian targets over the previous 48 hours, three current U.S. officials and a former U.S. official said

dailyNews.title: Justice Department steps up probe into Trump target John Brennan
dailyNews.description: The Justice Department has requested House Intelligence Committee records related to former CIA Director John Brennan, a frequent target of President Donald Trump, according to two sources familiar with the request

dailyNews.title: Senate Republicans optimistic about potential deal to fund TSA
dailyNews.description: There’s a potential deal in the works to re-open the Department of Homeland Security, according to four sources familiar with the negotiations between Congress and the White House. NBC News’ Tom Costello reports.
